## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss performance, workflow updates, and image generation for content.](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong performance: 9.5% session increase, improved SERP position (25th to 15th), 6% conversion event increase](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Image generation workflow: Strapi to provide specific design examples for more accurate AI-generated images](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Comparison pages: Ready to stage, with minor adjustments needed on Strapi's end](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Medium article formatting: Image workaround proposed for tables, considering time investment](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [Sessions jumped 9.5% week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Average SERP position improved from 25th to 15th](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [6% conversion event increase](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Comparison content performing well](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions dropped (attributed to Google algorithm updates)](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Content quality and targeting improving, leading to longer page visits](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Workflow Updates

  - [130 integration URLs shared with engineering team for meta tag updates](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [ETA for updates: likely next week or the week after](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Reminder: preserve existing component data when updating SEO](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

### Medium Article Formatting

  - [Tables incompatible with Medium's formatting](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Proposed workaround: Convert charts to images, include text in image metadata](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [To be implemented for articles with tables, considering time investment](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Image Generation Process

  - [Currently using reference images to guide AI generation](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Strapi to provide specific design examples for more accurate results](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Designer to be looped in for creating targeted reference images](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [GrowthX to define 5-7 image templates to focus on initially](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

### Comparison Pages

  - [Latest shared version approved](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Strapi to remove the table at the top](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [GrowthX can proceed with staging remaining comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Strapi to adjust column width for better text fit](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

  - [Mara to update on integration page meta tags once engineering provides timeline](https://fathom.video/share/RmShqhVHyAuxqjsj2K5ZjpxXVkiXxZVz?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
